description: Image attribute round-trip fixture: one hero component with an image attribute carrying focalPoint, metaData, and the host-agnostic media envelope. The expected page asserts the SCAPI ImageWO_v1 wire shape after MRT host-stamping (focalPoint + metaData passthrough; media collapsed into a fully-qualified url). Synthetic capture — both inputs and outputs were authored by hand. Replace with a real ECOM/SCAPI capture when an end-to-end stack is available.
